# Isaac Hernandez
**AI Engineer & Creative Technologist**
isaacsight@gmail.com | [doesthisfeelright.com](https://www.doesthisfeelright.com)

## Professional Summary
Innovative engineer and creator of "Does This Feel Right?", a platform exploring the intersection of human experience and personal software. Specialist in **AI Agent Architecture**, **Distributed Systems**, and **Mechanistic Interpretability**. Proven track record of building autonomous web systems and advanced research tools for LLM alignment.

## Core Competencies
*   **AI & Machine Learning:** LLM Integration (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic), Local Inference (Ollama, Llama 3, Mistral), RAG Pipelines, Prompt Engineering, Mechanistic Interpretability.
*   **Full Stack Development:** Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Next.js, FastAPI, HTML5/CSS3, D3.js.
*   **Infrastructure & Tools:** Distributed Architecture (Mac/Windows Node Clustering), Git, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, Lunr.js.
*   **Concepts:** The Autonomous Web, Studio OS, Digital Frontier Teams, Personal Software.

## Featured Projects

### **Studio OS (Does This Feel Right?)** | *Architect & Lead Developer*
*   Designed and built a custom **distributed AI publishing platform** encompassing a "Digital Frontier Team" of specialized AI agents.
*   Implemented a hybrid architecture leveraging a local **Windows Studio Node** for heavy inference (Ollama) and cloud APIs (Gemini/OpenAI) for specific tasks, optimizing for cost and privacy.
*   Developed a "system-level" approach to content creation, where AI agents assist in drafting, editing, and optimizing technical and philosophical essays.
*   **Tech Stack:** Python, FastAPI, React, Ollama, Local Networking.

### **Logit-Level Alignment Analyzer** | *Researcher & Developer*
*   Created a precision debugging suite for analyzing **LLM output divergence**.
*   Features real-time token diffing, logprob heatmaps, and millisecond latency profiling to understand model behavior at a granular level.
*   **Tech Stack:** Next.js, OpenAI API, Anthropic API.

### **Transformer Dynamics Visualizer** | *Developer*
*   Built an interactive tool for exploring **sliding-window attention** and **BPE tokenization** mechanisms.
*   Visualizes latent state preservation and causal masking to demystify Transformer architecture dynamics.
*   **Tech Stack:** React, D3.js, Tiktoken.

### **The Recursive Platform** | *Developer*
*   Engineered a self-referential static site generator that analyzes its own architecture.
*   Implemented a custom build system (`build.py`) that orchestrates the entire site generation and AI augmentation process.
*   **Tech Stack:** Python, Static Site Generation (SSG), Tailwind CSS.

## Philosophy & Writing
*   Author of "Does This Feel Right?", a collection of essays on slowing down, noticing reality, and the philosophy of technology.
*   Advocate for "Personal Software" that empowers individuals to own their digital infrastructure and data.
*   Explores the balance between high-tech automation and human-centric living.
